mandate: Partner authentication and onboarding flow. Invite acceptance page, email OTP via Supabase Auth, partner record claiming.
keyFindings: The join page lives at /partner-join (not /partner/join) to avoid inheriting the /partner layout's auth gate
Email OTP is the auth method — partners enter the pre-filled invite email, receive a 6-digit code, verify, and the partner record is claimed
The placeholder user_id of all-zeros UUID detects unclaimed invites
Auth callback enhanced to auto-detect partner claims and redirect to /partner instead of /dashboard
whatWorked: Keeping the auth flow separate from the couple flow. Multi-step UI (initial → OTP sent → verifying → claiming → done) with clear state management. Pre-filling the email prevents partners from using a different address than invited.
whatFailed: Initial placement at /partner/join caused it to inherit the auth-gated layout — moved to /partner-join.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The invite link format is /partner-join?email=partner@email.com. For v2, consider adding a signed token to prevent email enumeration. The auth callback partner detection should be monitored — it adds a query to every auth callback.
spiritContribution: Closed the gap between admin invite and partner access. Without this, partners had no way to actually use the dashboard.
